---
title: 主题总览
description: Mix Space 前端主题介绍与选择
---

import { ShieldCheck,GitPullRequestClosed, Rocket, GitBranch, Smile, Annoyed, Frown} from 'lucide-react'
import { ThemeCard } from '@/components/theme-card';

<div className="flex flex-col gap-4 not-prose">
<ThemeCard
  name="Yohaku / 余白"
  description="Yohaku（余白）取自日文，意为留白。它是 Shiro 的设计继承者，基于 Shiro 深度重构而来，延续了「纸的纯净与雪的清新」的设计语言，并在此基础上进一步打磨视觉体验与交互细节。"
  author="Innei"
  image="/screenshot/Yohaku.png"
  href="/docs/themes/yohaku"
  badges={[
    { label: '官方', icon: ShieldCheck },
    { label: '闭源', icon: GitPullRequestClosed },
    { label: 'Next.js', icon: Rocket },
    { label: '积极更新', icon: Smile },
  ]}
/>

<ThemeCard
  name="Shiro / 白"
  description="一个极简主义的个人网站主题，如纸的纯净，似雪的清新。"
  author="Innei"
  image="/screenshot/Shiro.png"
  href="/docs/themes/shiro"
  badges={[
    { label: '官方', icon: ShieldCheck },
    { label: '开源', icon: GitBranch },
    { label: 'Next.js', icon: Rocket },
    { label: '维护模式', icon: Annoyed },
  ]}
/>
<ThemeCard
  name="Kami"
  description="小小空间，大大梦想。日记风格的可爱主题，记录生活点滴，分享心情故事。"
  author="Innei"
  image="/screenshot/Kami.png"
  href="/docs/themes/kami"
  badges={[
    { label: '官方', icon: ShieldCheck },
    { label: '开源', icon: GitBranch },
    { label: 'Next.js', icon: Rocket },
    { label: '维护模式', icon: Annoyed },
  ]}
/>
<ThemeCard  
  name="Yun"
  description="A light & fast & lovely mx web style."
  author="Innei"
  image="/screenshot/Yun.png"
  href="/docs/themes/yun"
  badges={[
    { label: '官方', icon: ShieldCheck },
    { label: '开源', icon: GitBranch },
    { label: 'Next.js', icon: Rocket },
    { label: '不再维护', icon: Frown },
  ]}
/>
</div>
